-Matt Gaetz

Friend,

Democratic victories in the Georgia runoffs were not happy accidents. They were the direct result of years of efforts to register and mobilize Georgia Democrats. Every door that was knocked on, every text message sent, and every phone call made helped flip Georgia blue this year. We at the WVDP intend to follow in their footsteps but we need your help.
It takes time and effort to register new voters; and in a global pandemic that process is even more challenging. Traditional efforts like knocking on doors and hosting community events are no longer an option. We have to rely on digital and telephonic outreach like never before.
We are trying to raise the resources we need to help increase the active Democratic base in West Virginia. Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

| Dear Fellow American,

Happy New Year greetings from Judicial Watch! I hope 2021 brings happiness, good health and prosperity to you and everyone close to you.
2020 was a year of great challenges for our nation...and Judicial Watch continued to make history by fighting for the rule of law...for the American people's right to know...and for accountability from our government.

With your **_[best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52534&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMDYxNTUwMjg=)_** , in 2021 Judicial Watch will:
* **Keep fighting to keep our elections honest;**

* **Keep digging into serious allegations of Biden family corruption and influence peddling;**

* **Keep exposing the facts about the Deep State conspiracy to topple President Trump;**

* **Keep fighting to shut down sanctuary cities;**

* **Keep fighting for accountability in Congress;**

* **Keep fighting to get to the truth about the Obama-Clinton scandals;**

* **_And in 2021 we will not give the Deep State a pass on its illegal secrecy._**

I hope these brief bullet points of our 2021 plans reminds you of how important our work continues to be as we confront dishonest politicians of _both_ political parties _and_ combat unlawful government secrecy. And I hope you realize that without **_[your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52534&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMDYxNTUwMjg=)_** we cannot sustain our high-level impact on the challenges that 2021 will bring.
Since 1994, Judicial Watch has fought for accountability, the rule of law and the people's "right to know." We are independent of political parties. As our remarkable record shows, we are _best_ qualified to police our government and protect our constitutional system. _We rely on you_ , as we have always relied on the selfless support of patriotic Americans _to help give us the resources we need_.
I want to wish you and those close to you a very Happy New Year. I thank you again for your generous past support. I trust I can count on you to stand with us in 2021 **_[by making your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52534&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMDYxNTUwMjg=)_**!
Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Texas is at the center of the constitutional crisis that will play out in
our nation’s capital today.

The latest lurch towards authoritarianism — Donald Trump trying to shake
down Georgia’s Secretary of State to overturn his loss there; members of
Congress vowing to contest the results of our lawfully-decided
Presidential election; reckless right-wing Republican media fanning the
flames of sedition — is being aided and abetted by Texas’ junior senator,
Ted Cruz, who will use his position of public trust to try to defy the
will of millions of voters right from the floor of the U.S. Senate during
today’s vote to certify the election results.

You already knew he was cynical and lacking any personal honor. That could
explain his enthusiastic support of Trump, the man who insulted his wife
and accused his father of assassinating JFK. He showed us he was willing
to put his personal political career over concern for his family or the
interests of his constituents, that he would dedicate himself in service
to a man he once called a “sniveling coward,” a “pathological liar” and
“utterly amoral.”

But what was hard to imagine — even in the case of Ted Cruz — was that he
was willing to sell our democracy for another shot at being President.

Trump trying to take down the constitution on his own, maybe with an
assist by Rudy Giuliani in front of Four Seasons Total Landscaping, is a
farce. But with a cabal of corrupt Senators backing his bid to overturn a
legally decided election today - it now veers perilously close to a
tragedy for our democracy.

Because, even though this current effort to overturn the
democratically-decided election for President will not succeed, it is now
far more certain that a future effort will. The precedent will have been
set, and someone more ruthless, cunning and intelligent than Trump will
exploit it to overturn a future election, seize power and relegate this
noble experiment in self government to the history books.

And Cruz is doing this — sacrificing our elections on the altar of his
ambition — with only one purpose in mind: making himself the Republican
nominee for President in 2024.

Our response at this moment defines our country’s future. We either
satisfy ourselves with the cold comfort that the immediate attempt to
overturn the election won’t succeed, maybe shrug off this seditious ploy
as more “Cruz being Cruz,” or we decide that we’ll stand up to it and go
on the offense to save our democracy.

That’s why I’m sending you this email.

Texas, with some amount of poetic political justice, could be the state
that overcomes this effort to undermine our democracy by restoring faith
in the very democratic institutions that are under attack by Cruz and his
confederates.

If, in the most voter-suppressed state in the country, we are able to
improve access to the ballot box, encourage ever greater turnout, and
ensure that those communities targeted for intimidation and suppression
are the focus of our work to safeguard democracy, we will be at the
forefront of the democratic response to this authoritarian threat.

To do this, Powered by People will spend 2021 registering voters, holding
in-person canvasses, and working to expand access to the franchise for our
fellow Texans. We will build on the work of the more than 20,000
volunteers who joined our efforts in 2020, work that resulted in the
registration of more than 200,000 new Texas voters ahead of the November
election and one of the highest levels of voter turnout in Texas history.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44091?refcode=ema20210106-119248&t=1001&akid=119248%2E444211%2EUO_Fwm ]I’m asking you to contribute what you can to ensure that we have the
resources to get this done. As Stacey Abrams and the people of Georgia
showed us last night, this work is not easy, and won’t be accomplished in
one cycle. But if we stay after it, focus on connecting with voters who’ve
been counted out or written off, and relentlessly pursue victory cycle
after cycle, we will ultimately win Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44091?refcode=ema20210106-119248&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=119248%2E444211%2EUO_Fwm ]Contribute $3

While some will cynically attempt to tear down what has been built over
the last 245 years, together we will shore up, improve where necessary and
restore faith in the institutions that have made the United States the
greatest experiment in self government in human history.

I’m grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=119248%2E444211%2EUO_Fwm

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

| | Georgia voters, You did it again! You showed up in record numbers and made your voices heard! Your vote is your power, and you have made your community, your state, and your country stronger by casting your ballot. Though the polls are all closed and the ballots are now being counted, your job may not be quite done. **You may need to take additional action (called "curing") to ensure your vote counted. ** **Did you vote on a paper or provisional ballot on Election Day, and NOT on a voting machine?** Call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to make certain your vote has been counted. **Did you vote by mail?** Visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa305/34a064cc/1d752cd7/70278b8/1717491211/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/") to check the status of your mail ballot. Don't wait! Please confirm your ballot was counted NOW. Georgia voters have until Friday, January 8 to cure their ballots. If you're not sure whether this applies to you, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to double check. You can also visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa305/34a064cc/1d752cd7/70278b8/1717491211/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/") for more information. Thank you for voting! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Your voting experience matters. Fair Fight is documenting voters' stories to help in our fight for free and fair elections.
